events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, known for her chart-topping music, iconic dance moves, and successful acting career.

angles.name: J.Lo's Enduring Reign
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, J.Lo continues to dominate music, film, and fashion. What's your favourite J.Lo track or movie moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched in the US, forever changing the music industry, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its first music video.

angles.name: The Day The Music Video Arrived
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and literally changed the game. Remember seeing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' for the first time?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, a record that defined a generation and launched the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely A Classic
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history and counterculture, began in upstate New York in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death (1977)
events.blurb: It's the anniversary of the passing of Elvis Presley, the King of Rock 'n' Roll, who died in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since the world lost The King of Rock 'n' Roll. His legacy truly lives on.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, in 1969.

angles.name: That Iconic Walk
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers ever. Which track is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and trailblazer. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a Britpop icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Forever a rock 'n' roll star. What's your top track from the main man?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine', a powerful call for peace and unity, was released as a single in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A song that resonates just as powerfully today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod, revolutionising how people listened to music and paving the way for digital music players.

angles.name: The Device That Changed Music
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962, marking the beginning of a cinematic phenomenon.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who is your ultimate 007 and what's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today, a visionary musician and peace activist.

angles.name: A Timeless Voice
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy. What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' ninth studio album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but commonly known as 'The White Album', was released in 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Turns 58
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles gave us the sprawling, eclectic masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A double album full of iconic tracks.
